proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is spending thousands of hours on manual proposal creation. Here's where it's draining resources.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, Gmail teams spend hours crafting proposals. With our system, proposals are ready in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are ongoing losses eating into Gmail's efficiency.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Gmail staff spend over 200 hours a month manually creating proposals. Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Without automation, proposal branding varies wildly. This inconsistency can cost Gmail potential trust and client loyalty.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Manual processes mean Gmail often takes days to respond with a proposal. Each delay is a lost opportunity to competitors.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled workers for repetitive tasks drains Gmail's budget. Thousands of dollars could be saved by automating proposal creation.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Without rapid proposal generation, Gmail misses out on fast-moving deals. Speed could be the difference between winning and losing a client.

problems.title: Error-Prone Processes
problems.description: Manual proposal creation increases the risk of errors. Mistakes in proposals could cost Gmail clients and damage reputation.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these inefficient processes entirely.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, Gmail teams take hours to draft proposals. With this system, proposals are generated instantly, saving valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual branding leads to inconsistencies. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Gmail's brand.

solutions.title: Immediate Response
solutions.description: Now, it takes days to respond to potential clients. With our system, Gmail can respond within minutes, capturing more opportunities.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: High labor costs are tied to manual tasks. Automating with our AI reduces these costs significantly, freeing budget for strategic initiatives.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Current methods are prone to human error. Our AI ensures accuracy, reducing the chance of costly mistakes in proposals.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Boost Acme Corp's Efficiency with Gmail's Intuitive Email Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Transform your communication with Gmail's 15 GB storage, less spam, and mobile access. Let's enhance your business operations.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently losing potential efficiency and productivity due to outdated email systems.

problems.title: Inefficient Communication
problems.description: Every minute spent navigating a cluttered inbox is a minute lost in productivity. This inefficiency can cost thousands annually.

problems.title: Storage Limitations
problems.description: Storage constraints lead to lost data and wasted time managing archives. This results in missed opportunities and potential data loss.

problems.title: High Spam Levels
problems.description: Increased spam distracts and decreases employee focus. This results in significant productivity losses each day.

problems.title: Lack of Mobile Access
problems.description: Without reliable mobile access, your team misses chances to respond promptly, affecting client satisfaction and revenue.

problems.title: Data Security Risks
problems.description: Outdated security measures lead to vulnerabilities. Potential breaches could cost millions in damages and lost trust.

problems.title: Limited Integration
problems.description: Without seamless integration with other tools, workflow is disrupted. This hampers collaboration and innovation.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these critical issues, transforming losses into opportunities.

solutions.title: Gmail Business Email
solutions.description: Streamline communication while reducing spam. Enhance productivity with an intuitive user interface.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: Access emails from anywhere. Empower your team to stay connected and responsive on the go.

solutions.title: Enhanced Security
solutions.description: Protect your data with state-of-the-art security measures. Minimize risks and safeguard sensitive information.

solutions.title: Seamless Integration
solutions.description: Integrate Gmail with your existing tools. Improve workflow efficiency and collaboration.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail is designed to help you communicate efficiently and securely.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Reliability

whyUsCards.title: Top-notch Security

whyUsCards.title: Scalable Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Our services grow with your business needs, providing flexibility and scalability.

whyUsCards.title: Dedicated Support
whyUsCards.description: Benefit from our expert support team, ready to assist you at any time.
